title: mikania lasiandrae
intro: Mikania lasiandrae, also known as Mexican climbing hemp or wild hops, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its rich composition of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Mikania lasiandrae include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating symptoms of fever, pain, and infections. Traditional herbal preparations of Mikania lasiandrae include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and alleviate various health issues.
